reviews.review_description: This is a good app. Could be an perfect educational title. You need retexturing on the shuttle, international space station, and the lunar surface. Add information  to do with iss and hubble space telescope. Plus facts about moon. Zero g is spot. Please add settings to change locomotion. So You can snap turn. For those with senstive tummy. More experiences would be cool. Brilliant app look forward to see more.

A good form of edutainment. You have simple goals to achieve but mostly it's about just soaking in the enviroment.

I got it heavily discounted so for the price I paid there's really no complaints!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review. Enjoying the environment is what we intended when creating this experience.

reviews.review_description: Simple... Maybe too simple. I'd make the movement faster (it's a bit boring) and maybe a bit more difficult. Looking fwd to see more missions. When do you plan to introduce any?

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your valuable feedback. We´re thinking of making the movement speed configurable within the next updates.
We´re planning to introduce new missions on a regular, 2-3 month basis, depending on the feedback we get. The more feedback we receive, the more work we will spend polishing and extending Astronaut VR with more great content.

reviews.review_description: I really love floating above earth. Can't wait for more missions.

developer_response.body: Hi there, thanks for review. I hope you enjoy our new, fun mission released today: Food Delivery. There will be regular updates in the future as well, so stay tuned.

reviews.review_description: Sense of zero gravity works pretty well. Very entertaining with great inmersion.

developer_response.body: Hi there, thanks for review. I hope you enjoy our new mission released today: Food Delivery. There will be regular updates in the future as well.

reviews.review_description: Love the sense of scale! After a minute I felt like floating.

developer_response.body: Great that you liked our little experience. Our goal is to enable everyone to feel the sensation of being an astronaut.

reviews.review_description: I loved this too short experience. Looking at the earth from space, while floating around the space station is something I come back to often to relax.

reviews.review_title: Great concept. Keep up the good work
reviews.review_description: This is a great game concept and I love it. The controls work great and the missions give a little purpose to free roaming. I'd like to make a couple suggestions, for example when floating around in zero g, it would be cooler if instead of coming to an abrupt when you lift up on the controller, you drift a little bit in the direction you were going. And the only real way to stop would be to bump into something or change direction. Also, in the Space Walk, I feel that it would be cool to hear little Thruster sounds as you change direction or move forward. Also same suggestion in this situation, of the drifting a little bit instead of the abrupt stop.

Pretty good for what it is one thing I noticed that the world does not spin on its axis pretty realistic of course I never been on the moon or the International Space Station but it is really good graphics

I was expecting a bit more from this app but it did give you a floating feeling that took a bit to get used to.  Way to short though.  Worth free or .99 but not sure much more until they add some missions which they claim they are in the process of doing..

developer_response.body: Hello, as promised we released an update today which brings a new, kind of funny mission: Food Delivery. There will be regular updates in the future as well.

reviews.review_description: For the price this gives a very good feel for what it must be like in orbit. Of course the graphics could be more detailed (no doubt the developers will be working on that) but they are good enough to make the experience enjoyable.

developer_response.body: Hello, thanks for your nice review. We are working on improving the overall quality as well as adding more missions. Todays update brings a new mission, Food Delivery as well as better Oculus Go integration and other improvements.

reviews.review_description: This app is brilliant, my grandson dream's if being in a space ship when he grows up.He is on the headset ,always in space

Certain genres are done to death in VR, such as horror, first-person shooters, and of course space, to the point where there is inevitably an abundance of lackluster product. Thus, it is genuinely surprising when you do find a quality app. The truth is, I only really picked up Astronaut VR because it was on sale. Otherwise, I probably wouldn’t have. But, boy am I glad I did. It doesn’t last particularly long. There are 6 missions that you will likely just blow right through like I did, all in about 30-45 minutes. But for what I spent, I didn’t feel cheated. I rather really enjoyed it. The graphics were superb, the scale and immersion was awesome, and the tasks were kinda neat. The controls were finicky, but not to the degree that it was frustrating. Overall, nothing tops floating in space from your shuttle to the Hubble telescope to repair it. That moment alone makes the price of admission totally worth it. Highly recommended as a nice little treat on the cheap.

developer_response.body: Hi John, thanks for you review! glad you liked our little experience.

reviews.review_description: I might play it a few more times because it was fun, but it was over quick.
Amazing vr experience really felt like I was in space

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed the time in space.
